args: home=${AOS_HOME:-$HOME/.aos}; aos=${AOS_BIN:-$home/bin/aos}; receipt=$home/extensions/oracles/codex/Pack.lock; deadline=$(($(date +%s) + 300)); while [ ! -x "$aos" ] || [ ! -r "$receipt" ]; do if [ "$(date +%s)" -ge "$deadline" ]; then echo 'aos MCP startup timed out waiting for Codex oracle provisioning' >&2; exit 1; fi; sleep 0.1; done; exec "$aos" --principal codex-code mcp serve
